title: hieracium bifidum subsp. lepidum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. lepidum, also known as the rough hawk's beard or Hieracium lepidum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Hieracium bifidum subsp. lepidum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its potential medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
